emergency_definition: Caller identifies as G&M Pressure Washing or Shelley Manley
Gas station emergency (Chevron or Esso property managed by G&M)

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Leave detailed message, Ben will call back as soon as possible
emergency_routing_rules.exception_note: Manages ~20 Chevron and Esso gas stations. If they call after hours for emergency, patch call through to Ben.

non_emergency_routing_rules: Collect name, callback number, purpose. Route to Ben via call transfer if available. Otherwise take message for next business day callback.

call_transfer_rules.on_fail_message: I was unable to reach Ben directly. I've noted all your details and he will call you back as soon as possible.

integration_constraints: Do not proactively mention pricing - only if customer specifically asks
Do not route contractors in field - they have direct numbers
Clara targets: new clients, small jobs, service calls, no prior relationship
after_hours_flow_summary: No emergency service for general public after hours. Exception: G&M Pressure Washing (Shelley Manley, 403-870-8494) - patch through to Ben for gas station emergencies. All others: take message, confirm callback next business day.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet, understand purpose, collect name and callback number. Attempt transfer to Ben if he does not answer. If customer insists on speaking to a person, transfer to Ben second number (pending). Mention pricing only if asked: 15 service call fee, 8/hr residential.
questions_or_unknowns: Ben's second/personal number not yet active - required to enable live call transfer. Ben to provide via email reply.
notes: Onboarding call January 14 2026. Configuration complete pending Ben second number. G&M Pressure Washing is sole after-hours exception. Agent go-live target: weekend after Friday Jan 17 review call.

pricing_policy.mention_policy: Only mention pricing if customer specifically asks - do not proactively bring it up
